data.name: Rivers of Astrum: Daughter of Darkness
data.detailed_description:
Rivers of Astrum: Daughter of Darkness follows the story of Kimberly Ashmoore. Seeking to leave the only place that she has ever called home, Kim embarks on a mission, and gets swept up in a tide of destiny that no one could have predicted. This leaves her forever changed. Whether that change is for the better, or for the worse is for you to decide! (literally!)

Featuring meaningful choices, and dynamic relationships between the cast; the things you say and the actions you take will have impactful changes on the story, both obvious and subtle!

Rivers of Astrum: Daughter of Darkness boasts professionally hired and casted voice actors and actresses as well! (During Early Access, some characters may be unvoiced. Voices can all be muted, collectively or individually by character, for those that wish to play without them!)

And with nearly 40 content filters, the game can be tailored to every player's individual tastes! Most content types can be toggled on or off as desired, to customize the content of the game! (These filters are available through the game's "Preferences" menu.)

Key Features:

  • Dark Fantasy Adventure

  • Professionally voiced by freelance voice actors/actresses!

  • The lead voice actress has even been on HBO and Netflix!

  • Lesbian Protagonist

  • Meaningful Choices

  • Rendered in 2K resolution, as opposed to the standard 1080p, for higher image quality!

  • Nearly 40 Content Filters to enable or disable most content types!

  • Polyamory is possible!

Notes from the Developer:

  • Rivers of Astrum is a story that I've had in my head for 30 years. In that time it has been written, re-written and revised countless times, as it has evolved over the years. My three big passions are art, storytelling and creation in general. This is a passion project that I've been working on (in some form or another) for nearly 7 years.

  • Rivers of astrum is a long-paced story. It has ups and downs just like any other, but this story is intended (in it's final form) to encompass 6 volumes. "Daughter of Darkness" is volume 1 of the Rivers of Astrum Saga.

  • I am thoroughly interested in any and all feedback anyone may have, as I've received precious little of it. I also love to engage with the players, so please - if you have any concerns or questions at all - feel free to reach out!

  • It is worth noting that I have a standing agreement with the lead voice actress in the game. She voices NSFW scenes at her own discretion, and stops wherever she chooses. This does lead to some partially voiced NSFW scenes, but I personally feel like that's an infinitesimally small price to pay for the talent and immersion that she brings to the project!

data.short_description: A Dark Fantasy Adult Visual Novel, featuring a lesbian protagonist, and deep, meaningful choices and storytelling. Journey through the realm of Astrum, making friends, enemies and potential lovers. Discover the conspiracy that threatens an entire world, and fight to save it!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard
  • VR 支援: None
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.15+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OPenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or Higher
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Onboard
  • VR Support: None
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10.15+
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OPenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Onboard

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
